SCALING
Phi_ours(t) = 2 Phi_Michalowski(t/2)
D_ours(t,h;r) = 2^r D_Michalowski(t/2,h/2;r)
C_Michalowski(u;r) = 2^(r(r-1)-r) C_ours(2u;r)
